hero.title: Every night is
hero.subtitle: IDILI Live is a global producer, promoter and presenter of extraordinary live experiences — from West End musicals to immersive dining theatre, world-class opera to landmark exhibitions.

intro.heading: Where craft meets
intro.body1: Founded in 2016 by Ingrid Sutej and Miguel Esteban, IDILI Live brings together decades of combined experience across virtually every genre of live entertainment.
intro.body2: From the West End to Stockholm, from London opera houses to European concert halls, we specialise in experiences that linger long after the curtain falls.

productions.title: Mamma Mia! The Party
productions.description: London & Stockholm. An immersive ABBA-themed theatrical dining experience that redefined the genre.

productions.title: Rent The Musical
productions.description: 20th anniversary UK tour. Multi-award-winning rock musical returning to the West End.

productions.title: ABBA: Super Troupers The Exhibition
productions.description: The official ABBA exhibition, presented in London.

productions.title: Cecilia Bartoli
productions.description: Salzburg Festival production, UK & European tour.

productions.title: Les Grandes Voix
productions.description: World-class operatic stars including Anna Netrebko, Angela Gheorghiu and Rolando Villazón.

productions.title: Elf The Musical
productions.description: The beloved festive spectacular, bringing seasonal magic to stages across the UK.

productions.title: Monet's Garden
productions.description: A 360-degree journey immersive art experience through the history and works of Claude Monet.

productions.title: Viva Frida Khalo!
productions.description: A sensory journey through Frida’s world and art.

about.heading: A boutique studio with
about.body1: IDILI Live was founded in 2016 by Ingrid Sutej and Miguel Esteban, two of the live events industry's most respected figures. Between them, they bring three decades of experience spanning almost every genre of entertainment imaginable.
about.body2: Ingrid has produced and promoted hit West End musicals and concert tours across Europe with world-renowned opera stars. Miguel co-founded the Verbier Festival and manages leading artists including soprano Anna Netrebko.
about.quote: We believe every performance is a once-in-a-lifetime event — and we produce accordingly.
about.body3: Our close-knit but extensive team works across immersive theatre, classical music, exhibitions and large-scale musicals, always with the same commitment to exceptional production values and unforgettable audience experiences.
